projects.title: Artem Health Care
projects.summary: A patient management platform where speed and clarity are patient-safety features, not nice-to-haves.
projects.problem: Care teams were losing time navigating a legacy interface with inconsistent patterns, slow record lookups, and forms that weren't accessible to keyboard or screen-reader users.
projects.role: Led UI architecture and design system implementation, translating Figma designs into a reusable Angular + PrimeNG component library and auditing every core flow for WCAG compliance.
projects.impact: Reduced average time-to-record lookup and standardized over a dozen previously inconsistent form patterns into a single accessible pattern library used across the platform.

projects.title: Compito
projects.summary: A task and project management workspace rebuilt around focus — less chrome, more signal.
projects.problem: The existing board-based workflow buried important tasks under visual noise, and the component library had drifted out of sync with the Figma source of truth.
projects.role: Rebuilt the core board, card, and modal components in React with Tailwind CSS, and re-established a single shared component library synced with Figma via Zeplin handoff.
projects.impact: Cut UI implementation time for new features by reusing a consistent component set, and improved perceived performance through optimistic UI updates on drag-and-drop actions.

projects.title: Valyxto
projects.summary: A fintech dashboard where dense data had to become scannable without losing precision.
projects.problem: Users needed to parse large tables of financial data quickly, but the existing layout treated every data point with equal visual weight, making priority information hard to find.
projects.role: Redesigned the information hierarchy using typography scale, color, and progressive disclosure, and implemented the resulting components in Angular with PrimeNG and Bootstrap utilities.
projects.impact: Improved scan-ability of core dashboards through a clearer visual hierarchy and consistent data-table patterns reused across every report view.
